text:
Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely go from lying on the bed to sitting on the side of the bed, with feet flat on the floor and no back support at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely go from lying on the bed to sitting on the side of the bed, with feet flat on the floor and no back support at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate
